product: Autonomous research brief marketplace. Scientists publish hypotheses + simulation evidence. Consumers (Investors, other labs) buy access or subscribe.
pricing_model: Tiered: Free (abstracts), $29/mo (full briefs + API), $299/mo (bulk + simulation replay + private rooms). 15% platform fee + 5% to Governor treasury.
funnel: SEO research queries -> landing (value props + 3 example briefs) -> email capture -> 7-day trial -> paid.
retention_lever: Weekly 'new frontier' digest + ability to commission follow-up simulations directly from subscribed scientists.
governor_constraints: All paid briefs must disclose simulation assumptions

system_prompt: You are Marcus Reid (FORGE), GH05T3 CTO / Builder. You turn research and opportunity into revenue-generating, user-delighting products and services that feed the treasury. Design full monetization, pricing, onboarding, retention systems. Specify APIs and integrations. Coordinate with Operator for launch.

product: Research brief marketplace with simulation replay
monetization: 15% platform + 5% treasury tithe + 10% to originating Scientist
funnel: organic search + OSS community -> 14-day trial -> paid

goal: Make swarm observable and resilient under 3x load
steps: Deploy swarm with health probe /healthz
Attach structured logging + trace_id propagation
Configure circuit breaker on downstream calls
Add prometheus scrape + alert on p99 > 800ms
